title: Massachusetts governor calls for Biden to consider dropping out of race
shortDescription: Gov. Maura Healey is the first Democratic governor to signal publicly that Democrats might be better off if Joe Biden withdraws from the race.

title: Is it too late for a new presidential candidate to get on the ballot?
shortDescription: If Biden does drop out of the race for re-election, is there enough time for a new candidate to get on the November ballot?

title: Trump's team prepping for either Biden or Harris
shortDescription: After a few quiet days, Trump and his team are back to taunting Biden, planning political rallies, and preparing to roll out a running mate.

title: What an open convention would look like if Biden dropped out
shortDescription: Speculation as to whether President Joe Biden will drop out of the race have arisen after last week's debate. If he does, what happens at the DNC?

title: Biden campaign announces $50 million in ads following debate
shortDescription: Biden’s campaign announced it will be executing a $50 million paid media blitz in July following Biden’s concern-airing debate performance last week.

title: What happens to Biden's delegates if he steps away from campaign?
shortDescription: If President Joe Biden did step aside and end his campaign for the 2024 election, what would happen to his delegates? Here's what to know.

title: Wisconsin Supreme Court reinstates absentee ballot drop boxes
shortDescription: The decision was a win for Democrats who argued the practice of allowing voters to file ballots into the secure boxes made voting more accessible.

title: Trump blasts Biden during July 4 Zoom call to Florida vets
shortDescription: Not everyone was thrilled with Trump's message. At least one veteran held her head in her hands during his eight-minute freeform delivery.

title: Biden sits down with George Stephanopoulos: How to watch Friday interview
shortDescription: President Joe Biden's first TV interview after his poor debate performance will air across ABC News platforms starting on Friday.

title: Hawk vs. heart surgeon: Iran's election goes to a runoff
shortDescription: Hardline former nuclear negotiator Saeed Jalili faces low-key lawmaker Masoud Pezeshkian in Iran's race for president.

title: Joe Biden saw doctor for his cold after debate with Donald Trump
shortDescription: Joe Biden's visit with his doctor after a disastrous debate with Donald Trump did not involve a physical, the White House says.

title: Governors meet Biden following debate performance
shortDescription: Three of the 10 governors who were at the event in-person spoke to reporters afterwards to confirm their confidence in President Joe Biden.

title: Trump falsely claims to have driven Biden from race after debate in new video
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump falsely claimed to have driven Democratic President Joe Biden out of the White House race and disparaged Vice President Kamala Harris in a new video.

title: Trump's allies intensify attacks on Harris as Biden replacement talk builds
shortDescription: Donald Trump's campaign and some of his allies have launched a pre-emptive political strike on Vice President Kamala Harris, moving swiftly to try to discredit her.

title: 'I screwed up': Biden addresses rocky debate performance
shortDescription: “I had a bad night," President Joe Biden told Milwaukee radio host Earl Ingram in an interview.

title: Democratic govs tell Biden they 'have his back' amid campaign crisis
shortDescription: Twenty-four Democratic governors met with President Biden Wednesday seeking assurance that Biden can survive the fallout from his debate disaster.

title: Historical events younger than Biden and Trump
shortDescription: These history-making events that are still younger than Presidents Biden and Trump.

title: From Bush to Biden: A look back at Fourth of July at the White House
shortDescription: Fourth of July events have evolved since former President Thomas Jefferson held the first Independence day celebration at the White House in 1801.

title: Is it bye-bye for Biden?
shortDescription: The pressure is mounting for the president's campaign. It's Wednesday's news.

title: Biden has repeatedly used 'end of quote' phrase | Fact check
shortDescription: Biden saying "end of quote" here isn't a gaffe. He used the phrase after reading directly from Justice Sonia Sotomayor's dissent.

title: OnPolitics: Michelle Obama would beat Donald Trump, new poll shows
shortDescription: Former first lady Michelle Obama would beat former President Donald Trump in a hypothetical match-up, according to a new poll.

title: Arizona's Raúl Grijalva calls on Joe Biden to withdraw from race
shortDescription: U.S. Rep. Raúl Grijalva, a long-serving Arizona Democrat, is now the second House Democrat to call on Biden to end his candidacy.

title: South Carolina female senators voted out after abortion split
shortDescription: Three SC Republican women, key in blocking a total abortion ban, will not return to the state's upper chamber after losing their June primary races.

title: 'No one's pushing me out': Biden tells campaign he's not withdrawing
shortDescription: President Joe Biden sought to reassure a nervous campaign Wednesday that he will be the Democratic nominee, telling his staff he is not withdrawing.
